title: Fix support disable task by name (#6853)

features.name: disable task by name in class method
features.description: Code should include a disable statement referencing a task by name within a class method body
features.snippet: class driver; task get_and_send(); forever begin #1; end endtask task stop(); disable get_and_send; endtask endclass

features.name: disable with dotted task scope resolution
features.description: Code should include a disable statement with dotted task scope resolution for nested or parent-child task hierarchies
features.snippet: class parent; task child_task(); #10; endtask endclass class top; parent p = new; task stop_all(); disable p.child_task; endtask endclass

features.name: fork join with disableable task
features.description: Code should include a fork..join block containing a task that can be disabled by name, triggering the runtime fork-join miscount bug
features.snippet: fork task delayed(); #1000; endtask join task stop(); disable delayed; endtask
